recommendations.title: The Cleaning Lady
recommendations.overview: In a bid to distract herself from an affair, a narcissistic woman befriends a cleaning lady with burn scars, but she soon discovers that the scars may be more than skin deep.

recommendations.title: GirlHouse
recommendations.overview: In an attempt to make some extra cash while away at College, Kylie moves into a house that streams content to an X-rated website. After a deranged fan hacks in to determine the house's location, she finds herself in a terrifying fight for her life.

recommendations.title: Jack Brooks: Monster Slayer
recommendations.overview: As a child Jack Brooks witnessed the brutal murder of his family. Now a young man he struggles with a pestering girlfriend, therapy sessions that resolve nothing, and night classes that barely hold his interest. After unleashing an ancient curse, Jac

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Deader
recommendations.overview: When a tough-as-nails reporter is lead to a mysterious cult and the evil Pinhead, any moment could be her last.

recommendations.title: Opus
recommendations.overview: A young writer is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared thirty years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants and intoxicated journalists, she finds herself in the middle of his twisted plan.

recommendations.title: The Call of Cthulhu
recommendations.overview: A dying professor leaves his great-nephew a collection of documents pertaining to the Cthulhu Cult. The nephew begins to learn why the study of the cult so fascinated his grandfather. Bit-by-bit he begins piecing together the dread implications of hi

recommendations.title: Sound of My Voice
recommendations.overview: A journalist and his girlfriend get pulled in while they investigate a cult whose leader claims to be from the future.

recommendations.title: Popcorn
recommendations.overview: While holding a horror film festival, a group of film students find themselves stalked by a madman who may have a sinister connection to a cult leader.

recommendations.title: Messiah of Evil
recommendations.overview: A young woman searching for her missing artist father finds herself in the strange seaside town of Point Dune, which seems to be under the influence of a mysterious undead cult.

recommendations.title: Home for Rent
recommendations.overview: When her good tenants go bad, a landlord finds herself terrorized by a cult that seemingly has her husband enthralled — and her daughter in its sights.
